messages.text_en: Applications from those who wish to join the lawsuit against Roskomnadzor are still being received. One of the authors of the lawsuit against Roskomnadzor, regarding the blocking of calls on WhatsApp and Telegram, Dmitry Kisiev, a political technologist and lawyer, has published instructions on how to join this collective action.

messages.text_original: Крыша цеха автосборочного предприятия «Моторинвест» обрушилась под тяжестью снега, — губернатор «По предварительной информации, причиной обрушения стало скопление снега на крыше цеха. Спасатели продолжают поисково-спасательные работы», — сообщил глава Липецкой…
messages.text_en: The roof of the assembly plant owned by Motorinvest has collapsed due to the weight of the snow. According to preliminary reports, the cause of the collapse was the accumulation of snow on the roof of the building. Rescue workers are continuing their efforts to find and save those trapped inside.

messages.text_original:
«Сбербанк» сквозь санкции закупил рекламу своего ИИ на Олимпийских играх в Милане 

Российский разработчик искусственного интеллекта от «Сбербанка» под названием GigaChat закупил рекламу в Милане — ролики появились на улицах итальянского города, где сейчас проходят зимние Олимпийские игры 2026. 

 «А мы когда поедем в Милан? ГигаЧат уже там! На улицах олимпийской столицы появился экран с российским ИИ-помощником», — сказано в опубликованном посте к рекламному ролику компании. 

GigaChat — сервис на основе искусственного интеллекта. Этот чат-бот разработан «Сбербанком» (новое название «Сбер»). 

«Медуза» писала, что нейросеть GigaChat не готова разговаривать об Украине, о вторжении России в Украину, статусе Крыма, «ЛДНР», Владимире Путине, Владимире Зеленском, Михаиле Саакашвили, Алексее Навальном и о других политиках, а после трех вопросов на эту тему нейросеть будет работать только на сайте. 

Евросоюз ввел санкции против «Сбербанка» в июле 2022 года.
messages.text_en:
Sberbank managed to purchase advertising for its AI system during the Milan Olympics, despite the sanctions imposed on it. The Russian AI development company, GigaChat, acquired advertising space in Milan. These advertisements appeared on the streets of the Italian city, where the 2026 Winter Olympics will be held. 

“When will we go to Milan? GigaChat is already there! There’s a screen with the Russian AI assistant on the streets of the Olympic capital,” said the post accompanying the advertisement. 

GigaChat is an AI-based service. This chatbot was developed by Sberbank (now renamed “Sber”). 

Meduza reported that GigaChat’s neural network isn’t yet capable of discussing topics related to Ukraine, Russia’s invasion of Ukraine, the status of Crimea, LDNR, Vladimir Putin, Vladimir Zelenskyy, Mikhail Saakashvili, Alexey Navalny, and other political issues. After three such questions, the neural network will only function on the website. 

The European Union imposed sanctions against Sberbank in July 2022.

messages.text_original:
Трамп продлил на год санкции США против РФ, введенные из-за войны в Украине 

Это следует из уведомления, поступившего в Федеральный реестр, пишут российские госСМИ.
messages.text_en:
Trump has extended the U.S. sanctions against Russia for another year, in light of the war in Ukraine.  
This is according to a notice filed with the Federal Register, according to Russian state media.

messages.text_original:
Глава Верховного суда предложил рассылать повестки в суд через Max 

Председатель Верховного суда России Игорь Краснов заявил, что необходимо внести поправки в законодательство и обязать рассылать судебные сообщения через аккаунт на «Госуслугах». Для этого должны использоваться базы данных налоговых органов. 

 «Ими могут выступать функционирующий по принципу одного окна единый портал государственных услуг, а также национальный мессенджер Mах», — сказал Краснов, пишут «Ведомости». 

Таким образом председатель Верховного суда хочет исключить неявки на судебные заседания.

Кроме того, Краснов отметил, что в российском судопроизводстве используется искусственный интеллект, который «позволяет решать множество прикладных задач в судопроизводстве по обработке больших массивов данных и генерации документов».
messages.text_en:
The President of the Supreme Court proposed that court orders be sent through Max. 

Igor Krasnov, the President of the Russian Supreme Court, said that it is necessary to make changes to the legislation and to require that legal notices be sent through the “Gosluzhie” account. To do this, databases from tax authorities should be utilized. 

“It could be a unified service platform that operates on the principle of one window, as well as a national messaging system called Mah,” said Krasnov, according to Vedomosti. 

In this way, the President of the Supreme Court hopes to eliminate the need for people to attend court hearings in person. 

Additionally, Krasnov noted that artificial intelligence is being used in Russian judicial proceedings. This technology “allows for the processing of large amounts of data and the generation of documents.”

messages.text_original: Трое мирных жителей получили ранения в результате удара FPV-дрона по автомобилю в селе Замостье, сообщил губернатор Белгородской области Вячеслав Гладков.
messages.text_en: Three peaceful residents were injured as a result of an attack by a FPV drone on a car in the village of Zamostye, said Belgorod Oblast’s governor Vyacheslav Gladkov.

messages.text_original:
В Турции силовики задержали группу коммунистов, собиравших данные об изоляционных тюрьмах. Среди них член КПРФ Татьяна Десяткова 

18 февраля в Турцию прибыла группа коммунистов в составе правозащитной делегации с целью сбора фактов об изоляционных тюрьмах. Среди них была координатор Интербригады МГК КПРФ, член Бюро МГК КПРФ Татьяна Десятова, представитель Коммунистической партии Испании Фернандо Гарсия, итальянский журналист Андреа Лучиди и другие. Всех их задержали, сообщила пресс-служба Московский городской комитет (МГК) КПРФ.

 «Их работа по фиксации положения дел в жестких местах заключения представляет собой часть общественной деятельности, которая ведется на самостоятельной инициативной основе и нацелена в конечном итоге на защиту людей от произвола», — заявили в коммунистической партии. 

Члены КПРФ обратились в МИД РФ за помощью в освобождении Десятковой.
messages.text_en:
In Turkey, security forces detained a group of communists who were collecting information about solitary confinement prisons. Among them was Tatyana Desyatkova, a member of the Communist Party of Russia.

On February 18th, a group of communists arrived in Turkey as part of a human rights delegation, with the aim of gathering information about solitary confinement prisons. Among them were Tatyana Desyatkova, the coordinator of the Inter Brigade of the Communist Party of Russia; Fernando Garcia, a member of the Bureau of the Communist Party of Russia; Andrea Lucidi, an Italian journalist; and others. All of them were detained, according to the press service of the Moscow City Committee of the Communist Party of Russia.

“Their work in documenting conditions in harsh detention facilities is part of public activities that are carried out on an independent basis. Their goal is ultimately to protect people from oppression,” said the communist party.

Members of the Communist Party of Russia appealed to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Russian Federation for help in releasing Tatyana Desyatkova.

Additionally, at least 1,340 people were injured, with varying degrees of severity.

messages.text_original:
Волонтёрская сводка по мобилизации в РФ за 12–15 февраля 2026 года:

 Расходы России на набор и содержание группировки для возможного наступления в Донбассе сопоставимы с 90% дефицита федерального бюджета 2025 года; Минобороны подготовило законопроект, согласно которому при расчете стажа для назначения пенсий по выслуге лет один день военной службы «участников СВО» будет засчитываться за три дня работы; некоторым солдатам-срочникам, которых в январе вынудили подписать контракт на участие в войне по дороге к месту службы, удалось добиться его расторжения
 
 https://notes.citeam.org/mobilization-feb-12-15-2026
messages.text_en:
Volunteer reports regarding mobilization in the Russian Federation for the period from February 12 to 15, 2026:  
Russia’s expenses for recruiting and maintaining troops for potential attacks in Donbas are comparable to 90% of the federal budget deficit in 2025. The Ministry of Defense has prepared a draft law that stipulates that one day of military service for those who participate in voluntary military service should be counted as three days of work when calculating the years of service required for pension benefits. Some conscripts, who were forced to sign contracts to participate in the war during their journey to their deployment locations in January, managed to get those contracts rescinded.  
https://notes.citeam.org/mobilization-feb-12-15-2026

messages.text_original:
Всего за прошедшие выходные (20:00 13.02.2026 – 20:00 15.02.2026): 

 в Киевской  области в Вышгородском районе в результате удара беспилотника по частному дому пострадала женщина.

 в Сумской  области в результате атаки БПЛА на детскую больницу в г. Сумы был ранен мужчина; в Великописаревской общине в результате атаки беспилотника на гражданский автомобиль была ранена женщина, а при подрыве на дистанционно установленной мине получил ранения мужчина; в Чернетчинской общине вследствие удара БПЛА по частному дому пострадала женщина.

 в Харьковской  области  медицинская помощь понадобилась мужчине, пострадавшему при обстреле г. Купянск 15 ноября 2025 года; при обстреле с. Волоховка пострадал мужчина; в г. Дергачи при ударе беспилотника по автомобилю пострадал водитель.

 в Донецкой  области в п. Былбасовка вследствие удара БПЛА были ранены женщина и её 15-летний сын.

 в Днепропетровской  области в Межевской общине ранения получил мужчин; в Покровской общине Никопольского района в результате атаки беспилотника на автомобиль были ранены три женщины; в г. Никополь при атаке беспилотника на автомобиль пострадал водитель; в результате удар авиабомбой по Покровской общине Синельниковского района ранения получила 13-летняя девочка.

 в Запорожской  области  при авиаударе по г. Орехов был ранен мужчина; вследствие удара авиабомбами по частным домовладениям в с. Преображенка был ранен мужчина; в п. Камышеваха в результате удара БПЛА по автомобилю был ранен пятилетний мальчик; вследствие атаки на одно из сёл Запорожского района погибла женщина, и пострадал мужчина; в результате удара БПЛА по частному сектору г. Запорожье ранения получили три мирных жителя; в результате удара авиабомбами по п. Заречное ранения получили две женщины.

 в Херсонской  области  в с. Золотая Балка в результате сброса боеприпаса с БПЛА на частный дом пострадали мужчина и женщина; в с. Новая Каменка при атаке беспилотника ранения получили две женщины; в с. Качкаровка вследствие сброса боеприпаса с беспилотника погиб мужчина; при артобстреле п. Антоновка погиб мужчина; в г. Херсон вследствие атак БПЛА пострадали четыре мирных жителя, а при подрыве на мине была ранена женщина

 в Одесской  области вследствие попадания БПЛА по частному дому в г. Одесса погибла женщина.

 на оккупированной территории Луганской  области в результате налёта беспилотников на п. Центральный погиб мужчина, ещё 23 человека пострадали, в том числе девочка 2016 г. р.

 на оккупированной территории Донецкой  области в г. Покровск был ранен мирный житель.

 на оккупированной территории Херсонской  области  в «городском округе Новая Каховка» при атаке беспилотника погиб мирный житель. 

 в Брянской  области в с. Азаровка в результате атаки БПЛА на автомобиль погиб мирный житель; в Злынковском районе ранения получил сотрудник телекоммуникационной компании.

 в Белгородской  области  в п. Октябрьский при атаке беспилотника на автомобиль пострадали два человека; в с. Никольское вследствие удара БПЛА по автомобилю пострадал мужчина.

 в Краснодарском  крае  вследствие налёта БПЛА на нефтехранилище в п. Волна были ранены два человека.

Кроме того, стало известно  о ещё одной пострадавшей 6 февраля при атаке беспилотника в Миропольской общине Сумской области, а также о ещё одном пострадавшем при ударе БПЛА по частному дому в г. Конотоп 13 февраля; о ещё одной пострадавшей 11 февраля при атаке БПЛА на п. Золочев Харьковской области; о ещё одной пострадавшей 4 февраля при обстреле г. Берислав Херсонской области; о ещё двух пострадавших при ракетном ударе по ТЭЦ в г. Белгород 13 февраля.

Таким образом, за прошедшие выходные стало известно как минимум о 7 погибших и 71 пострадавшем мирном жителе .

 Удары  по энергетической инфраструктуре.
messages.text_en: During the past weekend (20:00 on February 13, 2026, to 20:00 on February 15, 2026), several incidents occurred in various regions of Ukraine. In the Kiyevska region, a woman was injured after a drone attack on a private house in Vyshhorodskyi District. In the Sumy region, a man was injured after a drone attacked a children’s hospital in Sumy. In the Velikopisaryevskaya community, a woman was injured after a drone attacked a civilian vehicle. In the Chernetchynska community, a woman was injured after a drone attack on a private house. In the Kharkov region, a man received medical treatment after being injured during an attack on Kupyaniv in November 2025. Another man was injured during an attack on Volokhovka village. In Derhachy, a driver was injured after a drone attacked his vehicle. In the Donetsk region, a woman and her 15-year-old son were injured after a drone attack on Bylbasovka village. In the Dnipropetrovsk region, several men were injured in Mezhevska community. In Pokrovskaya community of Nikopol District, three women were injured after a drone attacked a vehicle. In Nikopol, a driver was injured after a drone attacked his vehicle. In Sinelnikovskyi District, a 13-year-old girl was injured after a drone attack on a vehicle. In Zaporizhzhia region, a man was injured after a drone attack on Orekhov. In Preobrazhenka village, a man was injured after a drone attack on a private house. In Kamyshevyaha village, a five-year-old boy was injured after a drone attacked his vehicle. In Zaporizhzhia region, a woman and her husband were injured after a drone attack on a private house. In Zaporizhzhia city, three civilians were injured after a drone attack on a private house. In Zarechnye village, two women were injured after a drone attack on their vehicle. In Khersonskaya region, a man and a woman were injured after a drone dropped ammunition on a private house in Zolotaya Balka village. In Novaya Kamenskaya village, two women were injured after a drone attack. In Kachkarovka village, a man was killed after a drone dropped ammunition on his vehicle. In Antonovka village, a man was killed during an attack by drones. In Khersonskaya region, four civilians were injured after a drone attack on Novaya Kakhovka. In Bryansk region, a civilian was killed after a drone attacked a vehicle in Azarovka village. In Zlynkovskyi District, a worker from a telecommunications company was injured after a drone attack. In Belgorod region, two people were injured after a drone attacked a vehicle in Oktyabrskyi village. In Nikolskoye village, a man was injured after a drone attacked his vehicle. In Krasnodar region, two people were injured after a drone attacked an oil storage facility in Volna village. Additionally, it was reported that another person was injured on February 6th during a drone attack on Miropolska community in the Sumy region. Another person was injured on February 13th when a drone attacked a private house in Konotop. Another person was injured on February 11th when a drone attacked Zolochiv village in Kharkov region. Two people were injured on February 4th when a missile hit a power plant in Belgorod. In total, at least 7 people died and 71 people were injured during the past weekend.

messages.text_en: Summary from February 16th: 00:00 – The operation began at 00:11. In memory of Alexey Navalny. 04:33 – The Ukrainian Armed Forces carried out an offensive in the Zaporizhia region. 10:34 – Clemens Molena’s assessments regarding the mutual attacks. 12:13 – Playfra: The Russian Armed Forces have removed forces from the western bank of the Gaychur River. Ternovatye has been liberated.

Additional information for the summary of events from February 13–16, 2026:  
• Five European countries have officially confirmed that Navalny was poisoned two years ago. The poison identified as epibatidine.  
• DeepState: Ukrainian forces have advanced near the village of Verbovo, in Dnipropetrovsk Oblast.  
• A map by K. Molena shows artillery strikes near the village of Uspenovka.  
• Playfra: Ukrainian forces have driven Russian troops from the western bank of the Gaichur River.  
• In Factum: None of the Ukrainian advances took place in areas controlled by Russian forces. All of them occurred in “gray zones”.  
• Videos show the destruction of Ukrainian drones by Russian soldiers near the village of Beriózovoe, Dnipropetrovsk Oblast.  
• Russian forces are launching airstrikes on a bridge over the Volchya River, near the village of Kolomyitsy.  
• Playfra provides updates on the situation along the front line near Konstantynovka.  
• Videos show Ukrainian drones destroying Russian soldiers near Konstantynovka.  
• Russian Ministry of Defense: The “Vostok” group’s engineers have repaired a cable line break in Zaporizhia Oblast.  
• The TV channel “Officer” reports that Russian forces have actually taken control of Rodinskoye.  
• A map by K. Molena shows artillery strikes near Kupyansk.  
• Russian delegation will lead the new trilateral meeting between Russia, Ukraine, and the US.  
• Merz: The war will end when Russia is economically or militarily exhausted.  
• Polish Foreign Minister R. Sikorski says that the outcome of the war will not be determined by negotiations, but by who gives up first.  
• Macron: It’s necessary to “restabilize transparent communication channels with Russia”. Europe must be in a strong position to negotiate with Russia in the future.  
• Ukrainian troops defeated NATO forces during exercises in Estonia.  
• Politico: Western society shows limited willingness to make sacrifices for increased military spending.  
• Zelenskyy: Only in December did Ukrainian forces kill 35,000 Russian soldiers.  
• Zelenskyy: Ukraine doesn’t have many “Flamingo” missiles. One major production line was destroyed by Russian forces, but it has been relocated.  
• CIT reports on attacks on civilian infrastructure in January 2025 and January 2026.  
• Russian attacks on residential buildings with families and children in Ukrainian-controlled areas in Donetsk, Dnipropetrovsk, and Kharkov Oblasts.  
• Drone attacks on Russian vehicles in Bryansk and Belgorod Oblasts.  
• Drone attacks on Ukrainian vehicles in Sumy and Kharkov Oblasts.  
• In Kherson, Russian soldiers continue to drop ammunition from drones.  
• Reports on attacks on energy infrastructure from February 13–15.  
• Governor of Bryansk, Bogomaz: Electricity was restored within three hours.  
• Gladkov on February 14: In Belgorod, there will be no central heating supply until the end of the heating season.  
• Earlier, Gladkov asked residents not to wear “military or green uniforms” due to frequent drone attacks.  
• Videos show drone attacks on Moscow on February 15.  
• Support CIT’s efforts on our website or through Patreon.

messages.text_original: Дополнительные материалы к сводке за 13–16 февраля 2026 года: • пять европейских стран официально подтвердили отравление Навального два года назад, идентифицировав яд как эпибатидин; • DeepState: ВСУ продвинулись в районе с. Вербовое Днепропетровской обл.;…
messages.text_en: Additional information for the summary of events from February 13–16, 2026: • Five European countries have officially confirmed that Navalny was poisoned two years ago. The poison identified as epibatidine. • DeepState: The Ukrainian Armed Forces have made progress in the area around the village of Verbovo, in Dnipropetrovsk Oblast.

messages.text_original:
Всего за прошедшие сутки (20:00 15.02.2026 – 20:00 16.02.2026): 

 в Сумской  области в г. Сумы вследствие удара БПЛА по территории медучреждения был ранен один человек.

 в Харьковской  области  при ударе беспилотника по частному сектору с. Татьяновка пострадали пять человек, в том числе 15-летняя девушка.

 в Днепропетровской  области в результате артобстрела г. Никополь ранения получил мужчина.

 в Запорожской  области  в с. Таврическое при атаке беспилотника была ранена женщина.

 в Херсонской  области  вследствие сброса боеприпаса с БПЛА на частный дом в с. Станислав мужчина получил ранение; в г. Херсон при обстрелах были ранены мужчина и женщина, вследствие сбросов боеприпасов с БПЛА ранения получили двое мужчин, а при ударе беспилотником по медучреждению пострадали две сотрудницы.

 на оккупированной территории Донецкой  области на автодороге Донецк — Ясиноватая при подрыве на неустановленном взрывном устройстве пострадал мужчина.

 на оккупированной территории Херсонской  области  вблизи с. Василевка вследствие атаки БПЛА на автомобиль получил ранения мужчина. 

Кроме того, стало известно  о ещё четырёх пострадавших при атаках на Запорожский район 15 февраля; о ещё одной пострадавшей во время обстрела г. Херсон 14 февраля; об одной пострадавшей 15 февраля при атаке беспилотника на автомобиль в с. Никопольское Белгородской области.

Таким образом, за прошедшие сутки информации о погибших не поступало, пострадали как минимум   23 мирных жителя .

 Удары  по энергетической инфраструктуре.
messages.text_en: In the past day (from 20:00 on February 15, 2026, to 20:00 on February 16, 2026), there were several incidents in Sumy Oblast, Sumy city. One person was injured when a drone attacked a medical facility. In Kharkov Oblast, five people were injured when a drone attacked a private house in Tatyanovka. In Dnipropetrovsk Oblast, a man was injured as a result of artillery fire on the city of Nikopol. In Zaporizhia Oblast, a woman was injured when a drone attacked a house in Tavrychskoye. In Kherson Oblast, a man was injured when ammunition was dropped from a drone onto a private house in Stanislav. In Kherson city, another man and a woman were injured due to ammunition drops from drones. Additionally, four more people were injured during attacks on Zaporizhia Oblast on February 15th. One person was injured during artillery fire on Kherson city on February 14th. One person was injured when a drone attacked a car in Nikopolskoye, Belgorod Oblast, on February 15th. So far, no deaths have been reported. At least 23 civilians were injured. There were also attacks on energy infrastructure.

messages.text_original:
Волонтёрская сводка по мобилизации в РФ за 15–17 февраля 2026 года: 

МЧС и Минобороны согласовали возможность направлять солдат-срочников на службу в подразделения Федеральной противопожарной службы на фоне кадрового дефицита; редакциям районных газет в Башкортостане рекомендовали не указывать даты гибели участников войны, если между подписанием контракта и смертью прошло менее года; подростки с автоматами из Центра патриотического воспитания выступили на мероприятии в подмосковном храме

 https://notes.citeam.org/mobilization-feb-15-17-2026
messages.text_en:
Volunteer reports regarding mobilization in the Russian Federation for the period from February 15th to 17th, 2026: 

The Ministry of Emergency Situations and the Ministry of Defense have agreed to send conscripts to serve in units of the Federal Fire Service, given the shortage of personnel. Newspaper editors in Bashkortostan were advised not to mention the dates of death of soldiers who died during the war, provided that the time between signing the contract and their death was less than one year. Teenagers with rifles from the Patriotic Education Center also participated in an event at a church in Moscow’s suburbs. 

https://notes.citeam.org/mobilization-feb-15-17-2026

messages.text_original:
Всего за прошедшие сутки (20:00 16.02.2026 – 20:00 17.02.2026): 

 в Сумской  области в результате ударов беспилотников по частным домам в Кириковской общине погибла женщина, и пострадали ещё шесть человек, в том числе двое внуков погибшей 15 и семи лет; в г. Сумы вследствие массированного налёта БПЛА ранения получили шесть человек; в г. Белополье в результате атаки беспилотников пострадали четыре человека, в том числе трое сотрудников коммунального предприятия, работавших над восстановлением теплоснабжения; в с. Берёза при ударе беспилотника по жилому дому ранения получил мирный житель.

 в Харьковской  области  в результате удара двумя авиабомбами по с. Гусинка пострадали двое мужчин.

 в Донецкой  области в г. Николаевка в результате удара беспилотника по автомобилю погибли три сотрудника Славянской ТЭЦ, а ещё один был ранен.

 в Днепропетровской  области в г. Марганец вследствие артобстрела погиб мужчина.

 в Запорожской  области  в результате атаки БПЛА на г. Запорожье погибла женщина, и пострадали ещё шесть человек, в том числе полуторагодовалая и 11-летняя девочки.

 в Херсонской  области  в г. Херсон при артобстреле пострадал мужчина, в результате атак БПЛА и обстрелов на территории одной из больниц пострадали четыре человека, в том числе медсестра и пациент; около п. Солнечное при ударе беспилотника по автомобилю пострадал водитель поселковой администрации.

 в Одесской  области в г. Одесса вследствие налёта беспилотников пострадали три человека.

 на оккупированной территории Запорожской  области  при обстрелах с. Водяное погибла женщина, и был ранен мужчина; в результате атаки на «Токмакский муниципальный округ» один мужчина погиб, а ещё двое получили ранения.

 на оккупированной территории Херсонской  области  в с. Зализный Порт в результате атаки БПЛА на центр оказания социальной помощи была ранена проживающая там женщина. 

 в оккупированной Автономной Республике Крым  в г. Севастополь в результате детонации сбитого беспилотника пострадал девятилетний мальчик.

 в Курской  области  в с. Калиновка при атаке беспилотника на автомобиль погиб мужчина.

 в Белгородской  области в с. Криничное вследствие детонации беспилотника мужчина получил ранение; в п. Майский при ударе беспилотника по коммерческому объекту пострадали три человека, а при детонации ещё одного БПЛА пострадала женщина; в районе с. Почаево вследствие удара беспилотника по автомобилю пострадал водитель; в с. Белянка при аналогичных обстоятельствах был ранен мужчина.

 в Краснодарском  крае  в п. Ильский в результате падения обломков БПЛА пострадали два человека.

Таким образом, за прошедшие сутки стало известно как минимум о 9 погибших и 49 пострадавших мирных жителях .

 Удары  по энергетической инфраструктуре.
messages.text_en:
In the past day (from 20:00 on February 16, 2026, to 20:00 on February 17, 2026), in Sumy Oblast, a woman was killed and six others were injured as a result of drones attacking private homes in Kirikovka. In Sumy itself, six people were injured due to a series of drone attacks. In Belopoli, four people were injured as a result of drone attacks. Among them were three employees of a utility company who were working to restore heating supplies. In Berozha, a peaceful citizen was injured when a drone attacked a residential house.

In Kharkov Oblast, two men were injured when two aircraft bombs were dropped on Gusinka village.

In Donetsk Oblast, in Nikolaevka, three employees of the Slaviansk Thermal Power Plant were killed and one was injured when a drone attacked a car.

In Dnipropetrovsk Oblast, a man was killed when his house was attacked by artillery fire.

In Zaporizhia Oblast, a woman was killed and six others were injured as a result of drone attacks. Among them were a 1.5-year-old girl and an 11-year-old girl.

In Kherson Oblast, a man was injured when his house was attacked by artillery fire. Four people were also injured as a result of drone attacks and shelling at a hospital. A driver from the village administration was injured when a drone attacked a car near Solnechnoye village.

In Odessa Oblast, three people were injured when drones attacked vehicles in Odessa.

In Zaporizhia Oblast, a woman was killed and two men were injured when drones attacked a village. One man was killed and two others were injured as a result of drone attacks on the Tokmak Municipal District.

In Kherson Oblast, a woman was injured when a drone attacked a commercial building in Zalizny Port.

In the occupied territory of Zaporizhia Oblast, a woman was killed and one man was injured when drones attacked a village. One man was killed and two others were injured as a result of drone attacks on the Tokmak Municipal District.

In the occupied Autonomous Republic of Crimea, a nine-year-old boy was injured when a drone was destroyed in Sebastopol.

In Kursk Oblast, a man was killed when a drone attacked a car in Kalinovka.

In Belgorod Oblast, a man was injured when a drone exploded in Krinichne. Three people were injured when a drone attacked a commercial building in Maiysky. Another woman was injured when a drone exploded. In Pochaevovo, a driver was injured when a drone attacked a car. In Belyanka, another man was injured under similar circumstances.

In Krasnodar Krai, two people were injured when debris from a drone fell on them in Ilsky.

In total, at least 9 civilians were killed and 49 were injured during this period.

messages.text_original:
Всего за прошедшие сутки (20:00 17.02.2026 – 20:00 18.02.2026): 

 в Черниговской  области  в результате ударов БПЛА по одному из сёл Сновской общины ранения получил мужчина.

 в Сумской  области вследствие атаки БПЛА на г. Лебедин пострадали двое мужчин.

 в Харьковской  области  в с. Комиссарово при ударе беспилотника по частному дому погибла женщина.

 в Днепропетровской  области в результате ударов по Синельниковскому району погиб мужчина.

 в Запорожской  области  в п. Новониколаевка в результате удара беспилотника был ранен мужчина.

 на оккупированной территории Херсонской  области  в п. Подлесное при подрыве на мине погиб мужчина; в г. Алёшки также вследствие подрыва на мине погиб ещё один мужчина.

 в Брянской  области  при атаке БПЛА на с. Алейниково погибла женщина; в п. Рудач в результате удара БПЛА по автомобилю газовой службы были ранены два сотрудника; в с. Воронок вследствие удара беспилотника по автомобилю, на котором развозили продукты, пострадали двое мужчин; в с. Солова при ударе БПЛА по автомобилю был ранен мужчина.

 в Белгородской  области в с. Верхопенье в результате атаки беспилотника на частный дом пострадали два человека; вследствие удара БПЛА по автомобилю в районе х. Церковный был ранен водитель; при аналогичных обстоятельствах в с. Мешковое пострадали двое мужчин.

Кроме того, стало известно  о ещё шести пострадавших в результате налёта беспилотников на г. Сумы 17 февраля; о ещё одном пострадавшем 17 февраля в результате атак БПЛА в г. Николаевка Донецкой области; о шестилетней девочке, пострадавшей вследствие атаки БПЛА на г. Запорожье 17 февраля; о том, что в больнице скончался мужчина, получивший ранения при обстреле г. Херсон 13 февраля, а также о медработнице, пострадавшей при ударах по больнице в г. Херсон 16 февраля, и о четырёх медсёстрах, которые пострадали в результате ударов БПЛА по той же больнице 17 февраля.

Таким образом, за прошедшие сутки стало известно как минимум о 6 погибших и 27 пострадавших мирных жителях .

 Удары  по энергетической инфраструктуре.
messages.text_en:
In the past day, from 20:00 on February 17, 2026, to 20:00 on February 18, 2026:  
In the Chernihiv region, a man was injured after being hit by a drone near one of the villages in Snovskaya District.  
In Sumy region, two men were injured when a drone attacked the city of Lebedin.  
In Kharkiv region, a woman died after being hit by a drone near her home in Komissarovo.  
In Dnipropetrovsk region, a man died after being hit by a drone in Sinelnikovskyi District.  
In Zaporizhia region, a man was injured after being hit by a drone near the village of Novonikolayevka.  
On the occupied territory of Kherson region, a man died after being hit by a mine near Podlesnoye. Another man also died in Alekshki due to a mine explosion.  
In Bryansk region, a woman died after being hit by a drone near the village of Aleynikovo. Two employees were injured when a drone attacked a gas vehicle in Rudach. In Voronok, two men were injured when a drone attacked a car that was delivering goods. In Solova, a man was injured when a drone attacked a car.  
In Belgorod region, two people were injured when a drone attacked a private home in Verkhopenye. In Tserkovnyi, a driver was injured when a drone attacked his vehicle. In Meshkovoye, two men were injured in similar circumstances.  
Additionally, six more people were injured due to drone attacks on Sumy on February 17th. Another person was injured on February 17th when drones attacked Nikolayevka in Donetsk region. There’s also a six-year-old girl who was injured when drones attacked Zaporizhia on February 17th. In Kherson, a man died after being injured during an attack on the city on February 13th. There’s also a nurse who was injured when drones attacked the hospital in Kherson on February 16th. Four nurses were also injured when drones attacked the same hospital on February 17th.  
In total, at least 6 people have died and 27 people have been injured as a result of drone attacks over the past day.

But I wonder what’s going on with the Russian equivalent of Starlink… That is, the project called “Rassvet” by the company Bureau 1440. According to their plans…

messages.text_original:
Применение Ка-52М новых 30-мм снарядов с дистанционным (программируемым) подрывом для уничтожения украинских дронов-камикадзе.

Заявляется, что всего за 2 боевых вылета экипаж смог сбить 25 украинских беспилотников . Видео: @bortzhyrnal 

Впервые когда вертолеты начали привлекаться для борьбы с дронами стала очевидна нехватка программируемых снарядов для них. Появление же таких снарядов в разы повысит эффективность борьбы с беспилотниками не только экипажей вертолетов, так и расчетов ЗСУ и ЗРПК, если данные боеприпасы "перепадут" и в их боекомплекты. 

 Военный Осведомитель
messages.text_en:
The use of the Ka-52M’s new 30-mm shells with remote-controlled (programmable) detonation capabilities is effective for destroying Ukrainian drones. It is reported that in just two combat missions, the crew was able to shoot down 25 Ukrainian drones. Video: @bortzhyrnal

For the first time, it became clear that there was a shortage of programmable shells for use against drones. The introduction of such shells would greatly improve the effectiveness of combat against unmanned aircraft, not only for helicopter crews but also for soldiers and officers who use anti-aircraft weapons. If these shells are included in their weaponry as well, their effectiveness will be significantly increased.

Military Informant

messages.text_original:
Судя по статьям западных изданий, Иран все же не соглашается с основными требованиями США на переговорах .

И хотя Трамп по своему обычаю пока еще дает то 30, то 10 дней на возможное заключение сделки с Ираном, все выглядит так, что Аннушка уже разлила масло - сосредоточение американских ВВС и ВМС на Ближнем Востоке находится на самом высоком уровне со времен войн в Ираке. 

При этом, этих сил все еще значительно меньше, чем США закладывали для свержения Саддама Хусейна , а сухопутной компоненты нет вовсе - в данном случае США и Израиль планируют обойтись лишь воздушной компонентой.

Это говорит о том, что сценарий "свержения режима" в Иране маловероятен . Да, Иран получит гораздо больший урон, чем получал летом 2025 года, однако наиболее опасный для него момент с протестами уже прошел, а значит одними бомбами поменять власть уже не выйдет.

 Если операция против Ирана все же начнется в ближайшие недели (о чем говорит большинство факторов), то стоит ожидать как минимум многодневной кампании воздушных и ракетных ударов, которые вновь выведут из игры большую часть иранского ПВО, а также нанесут значительный ущерб ракетной и ядерной программе .

Ответные действия Ирана вновь будут заключаться в ракетных ударах по Израилю и базам США в регионе . При этом, вполне вероятно, что они окажутся еще менее эффективными, чем прежде. Как из-за истощения иранских запасов ракет и потерь в пусковых, так и из-за значительного наращивая компоненты ПВО-ПРО в регионе силами США. 

Как итог, наиболее вероятно, что власть Ирана сохранится даже под такими ударами, но армия и КСИР понесут тяжелые потери . После чего стороны опять вернутся к переговорам о судьбе иранских ракет, ядерки и прокси, но уже с позиций значительного ослабления военного потенциала Ирана. 

Похожая практика существовала в отношении Ирака после "Бури в пустыне" и до "Иракской свободы": режим бесполетных зон со сбитием иракских самолетов и атаками на силы ПВО Ирака при попытке противодействия там ВВС США и союзников, а также регулярные ударные операции по иракской военной и государственной инфраструктуре. Примерами последнего являются американские операции 1993, 1996 и 1998 гг. Причем проходившие на фоне многолетней программы разоружения Ирака и демонтажа его программы ОМП. Видимо этот опыт могут попробовать повторить и к Ирану. 

 #Иран #США #Израиль 

 Военный Осведомитель
messages.text_en:
Based on the articles in Western publications, it seems that Iran still doesn’t agree with the main demands made by the United States during negotiations.

Although Trump, as is his habit, still gives Iran some time to reach an agreement with the US, it seems like the situation has reached a point where American military forces are being deployed in the Middle East at their highest level since the wars in Iraq.

However, these forces are still far fewer than those that the US planned to use to overthrow Saddam Hussein. Moreover, there isn’t even any ground-based forces involved. In this case, the US and Israel plan to rely solely on air forces to carry out their plans.

This indicates that the scenario of overthrowing the Iranian regime is unlikely. Yes, Iran will suffer greater losses than it did in the summer of 2025. But the most dangerous period for Iran has already passed. Therefore, it won’t be possible to change the government just by using bombs.

If an operation against Iran does start in the coming weeks, then it’s likely that there will be several days of air and missile attacks. This will likely cause significant damage to Iran’s air defense system as well as its nuclear program.

Iran’s response will likely be to launch missiles at Israel and US bases in the region. However, these attacks are likely to be less effective than before. This is due to both the depletion of Iran’s missile stocks and losses during launches, as well as the fact that the US has significantly strengthened its air defense capabilities in the region.

In conclusion, it’s likely that Iran’s government will remain in power despite these attacks. But both the army and the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps will suffer heavy losses. After that, both sides will return to negotiations about Iran’s missiles, nuclear program, and other issues. But this time, they will do so with Iran’s military capabilities greatly weakened.

A similar approach was used in relation to Iraq after the “Desert Storm” and before the “Iraq Freedom” operation. During that time, Iraq was subjected to air strikes on its planes, attacks on its air defense forces when they tried to counter US and allied forces, and regular attacks on Iraqi military and government infrastructure. Examples of this include the American operations in 1993, 1996, and 1998. This approach seems like something that could be tried again with Iran.

#Iran #US #Israel

Так "совпало" что съезд совета мира проходит на фоне новостей, что США сконцентрировали у границ Ирана крупневшую авиагруппировку в регионе со времен вторжения в Ирак 2003 года, которую с моря прикроют ударные группы двух авианосцев.

Все это ради главного шоу – отчет Трампа перед конгрессом 24 февраля. Ему нужно хоть что-то показать. Результатов по украинскому конфликту нет, про 8 завершенных войн уже все слышали много раз. 

Поэтому у миротворца номер 1 надежда на "историческую сделку с Ираном", которую он сейчас пытаются продавить демонстрацией "всей мощи армии". Либо покозырять мирным советом, где он выглядит глобальным лидером.

messages.text_en:
Trump held his first meeting of the “Peace Council”. It seems like a party for his “friends”, where Trump praises each participant in turn. Of course, the key players and many traditional allies of the US aren’t present at this party. 

It happens to be that the meeting takes place during a time when news reports are focusing on the situation in Iran. The US has deployed a large number of aircraft in the region, since its invasion of Iraq in 2003. These aircraft are protected by two aircraft carriers from the sea side. 

All this is done in order to present Trump’s report to Congress on February 24th. He needs to show something at least. There’s no information about the results of the conflict in Ukraine. And about the eight wars that have already taken place, everyone has heard about them many times before. 

So, Trump hopes to achieve a “historic deal with Iran”. He’s trying to do this by showing off the power of his military forces. Or maybe he wants to show off his status as a global leader through this Peace Council. 

Subscribe to Krachen on Telegram | Max

The soldier from ChVK “Wagner”, who was released from prison and went straight to Bakhmut, wrote a book about this experience. You can find links to the book on various e-commerce platforms 👇  
➡️ Buy it on Ozon 🛒  
➡️ Buy it on Wildberries 🛒  
➡️ Electronic version available ⚡️

The book describes the details of a unique military operation in modern history, known as “Bakhmut’s Grinding Mill”. The story starts with a group of prisoners from ChVK “Wagner” being selected for this operation. This operation was named Project “K”.  
The book also tells how someone who has no military experience can become an excellent soldier. You’ll learn about the training process in one of the most secretive ChVKs in the world. It also describes the methods used to maintain discipline among the soldiers from Wagner. The book also includes details about the battles in Bakhmut and the trench warfare around the city.

messages.text_original:
NEW: Five hundred days ago Russia launched an unprovoked war of conquest against Ukraine.

The Russian military intended to take Kyiv within three days but failed to accomplish any of its intended objectives in Ukraine.

Determined and skillful Ukrainian resistance has forced the culmination of multiple Russian offensives including the one aimed at Kyiv and has liberated Sumy and Chernihiv oblasts, as well as the parts of Kharkiv, Mykolaiv, and Kherson oblasts that Russian forces had temporarily seized.

Ukrainian forces have secured and retained the initiative and are conducting counteroffensive operations along most of the frontline with Russian forces focused almost entirely on trying to hold on to the Ukrainian lands they still occupy.

With Western assistance, Ukraine has ensured its independence but faces the critical task of liberating the strategically vital territory still under Russian control.

Full report: https://isw.pub/UkrWar079823

messages.text_original:
NEW: Russian forces conducted a series of Shahed 131 and 136 drone strikes across Ukraine on July 11, likely in a demonstrative response to the 2023 NATO Summit in Vilnius and to threaten the Black Sea grain deal.

Russia’s drone strikes on port infrastructure also coincide with the first day of the NATO Summit in Vilnius and are likely intended to discourage NATO members from providing more military aid to Ukraine.

Russia may be threatening the Black Sea grain deal to message the deal's original broker, Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan, that his recent statement of support for Ukraine’s NATO membership and the return of the five Ukrainian Azovstal commanders on July 7 has not gone unnoticed and is not appreciated by the Kremlin.

Latest assessment https://isw.pub/UkrWar071123

messages.text_original:
Ukrainian forces conducted counteroffensive operations on at least three sectors of the front on July 11 and made gains in some areas. The Ukrainian General Staff reported that Ukrainian forces continued offensive operations in the Melitopol (western Zaporizhia Oblast) and Berdyansk directions (Zaporizhia Oblast-Donetsk Oblast border area), and Ukrainian Eastern Group of Forces Spokesperson Colonel Serhiy Cherevaty stated that Ukrainian forces are continuing counteroffensive operations around Bakhmut.

Geolocated footage published on July 10 indicates that Ukrainian forces advanced northeast of Robotyne (15km south of Orikhiv).[18] A Russian milblogger also claimed that Ukrainian forces established control over new positions northwest of Klishchiivka (7km southwest of Bakhmut) and advanced up to 1.5km near Rozdolivka (19km northeast of Bakhmut). https://isw.pub/UkrWar071123
messages.text_en:
Ukrainian forces conducted counteroffensive operations on at least three sectors of the front on July 11 and made gains in some areas. Geolocated footage published on July 10 indicates that Ukrainian forces advanced northeast of Robotyne (15km south of Orikhiv).[18] A Russian milblogger also claimed that Ukrainian forces established control over new positions northwest of Klishchiivka (7km southwest of Bakhmut) and advanced up to 1.5km near Rozdolivka (19km northeast of Bakhmut). https://isw.pub/UkrWar071123

messages.text_original:
Here’s everything else you need to know from tonight’s campaign assessment: https://isw.pub/UkrWar071123 

Germany and France pledged to provide Ukraine more weapons systems during the first day of the 2023 NATO Summit in Vilnius on July 11.

A coalition of 11 states signed a memorandum with Ukraine outlining the terms for training Ukrainian pilots on the F-16 aircraft at the 2023 NATO Summit in Vilnius on July 11.

The Kremlin’s and Russian milbloggers’ reactions to the first day of the NATO Summit were relatively muted.

Russian Defense Minister Sergei Shoigu attempted to portray the Ukrainian counteroffensive as a failed effort against the backdrop of the NATO Summit.

A Ukrainian Storm Shadow missile strike reportedly killed Deputy Commander of the Russian Southern Military District (SMD) Lieutenant General Oleg Tsokov at the command post of the 58th Combined Arms Army (CAA) in occupied Berdyansk, Zaporizhia Oblast.

Russian milbloggers criticized the Russian military command for failing to defend against Ukrainian strikes on Russian headquarters.

Chief of the Russian General Staff Army General Valery Gerasimov reportedly fired Commander of the 58th CAA Major General Ivan Popov after Popov voiced his concerns over the need for troop rotations in western Zaporizhia Oblast amidst Ukrainian counteroffensives.

An unknown actor killed the Krasnodar City Deputy Head for Mobilization, Captain Stanislav Rzhitsky, on July 10.

Russian forces are conducting offensive operations along the Svatove-Kreminna line and made territorial gains.

Ukrainian forces continued counteroffensive operations on Bakhmut’s northern and southern outskirts.

Russian forces launched assaults on Ukrainian positions on the Donetsk City-Avdiivka frontline.

Russian and Ukrainian forces continued ground attacks along the administrative border between Zaporizhia and Donetsk oblasts.

Ukrainian forces continued counteroffensive operations south of Orikhiv in western Zaporizhia Oblast.

The Kremlin continues measures to gradually mobilize Russia’s defense industrial base (DIB) to meet Russian military demands in Ukraine without conducting a wider economic mobilization.

The Ukrainian Resistance Center reported on July 11 that the All-Russia State Television and Radio Broadcasting Company (VGTRK) is struggling to establish regional branches in occupied territories in Ukraine.

messages.text_original:
📌 German Minister of Justice Marco Buschmann said the country's policy regarding the Nord Stream-2 pipeline construction contributed to the war in Ukraine

 "We are dealing with dictators who make territorial claims. And who counts on the fact that Western democracies will leave them under pressure. At that time, it was believed that we were talking about Czechoslovakia. Likewise, many believed that we were talking about Crimea. Or later, about Ukraine. But this is not so. Our entire system of values is under attack here," said Buschmann.

In his opinion, nothing can be achieved with a policy of reconciliation because "the dictator perceives this only as an invitation." He also mentioned that Russia had already conducted large-scale destabilization operations in the Baltic States.

#UkraineRussiaWar #MilitarySummary 
Negotiations continue in Geneva 🇨🇭 between the USA 🇺🇸 , Russia 🇷🇺 and Ukraine 🇺🇦 . And apparently, these talks will once again lead nowhere 🚫 🤷 . The conflicting sides still cannot agree on the wording of the main question that will be put before Ukrainians at the spring referendum, which will most likely take place in May 2026 📅 🗳 .

Meanwhile, the Russian Armed Forces 🇷🇺 ⚔️ continue their offensive along the entire front line. Today, information is coming in about the collapse of the Ukrainian Armed Forces' defense 🇺🇦 💔 in the Kostiantynivka sector of the front 🏚 💥 .

Russia is also continuing preparations for the next massive strike 🚀 🔥 using Iskander-type missiles and hundreds of drones 🛸 .

❗️ Hungary has suspended diesel supplies to Ukraine, Foreign Minister Péter Szijjártó said.

He added that deliveries will not resume until oil flows through the Druzhba pipeline are restored.

Slovak Prime Minister Robert Fico also said that Bratislava is considering suspending electricity supplies to Ukraine for the same reason.

messages.text_original:
#UkraineRussiaWar #MilitarySummary 
 🇺🇦 🤝 🇷🇺 The third round of negotiations in Geneva between Russia, Ukraine, and the US ended on February 18 without a breakthrough 🚫 💥 . The second day of negotiations lasted only two hours before the Russian delegation left the meeting 🚶‍♂️ 🚪 . Chief negotiator Medinsky described the talks as “difficult but businesslike” 🗣 💼 and announced further rounds. Zelensky accused Russia of deliberately delaying the talks 🐢 🕒 , but acknowledged “concrete progress on military aspects” 🎯 ⚙️ . The central points of contention—territorial concessions 🗺 🤔 and security guarantees 🛡 ❓ —remained unresolved.

In the Zaporizhzhia Oblast, the Russian Ministry of Defense reports the capture of another village 🚩 🏘 west of Huliaipole. However, further activity can also be observed along the Russian-Ukrainian border, where Russian advances are becoming increasingly frequent ⚔️ 🔥 , with a particular focus on the Sumy Oblast 🎯 🗺 .


 Negotiations Failed Catastrophically ❌ 🤝 Defense of Kharkivka & Krynychne Has Collapsed 💥 Military Summary And Analysis For 2026.02.18

messages.text_original:
💊 Zelensky: Russia is seeking not elections, but my removal

“Partners must decide what they truly want — elections or simply a change of president. In my view, Russia is aiming to replace me by any means.

Elections are the civilized path, but the people must decide who they live with. I am ready to consider proposals from the United States if they can bring us closer to peace. However, even a two-month ceasefire for the sake of elections would not mean the end of the war, and holding a vote under such conditions is not supported by either parliament or society.”

 🔵 Military Summary 
 📱 Новости России | Военные сводки
messages.text_en:
💊 Zelenskyy: Russia isn’t seeking elections, but rather my removal from power.  
“Our partners must decide what they truly want—elections or simply a change of president. In my opinion, Russia is trying to replace me by any means possible.  
Elections are the civilized way to go, but it’s up to the people to decide who they want to live with. I’m willing to consider proposals from the United States, provided they can bring us closer to peace. However, even a two-month ceasefire just for the sake of elections won’t mean the end of the war. Holding elections under such conditions isn’t supported by either parliament or society.”  
🔵 Military Summary  
📱 Novosti Russia | Military Updates

messages.text_original:
“If our European neighbors, instead of recognizing their mistakes and understanding that we will have to live together anyway, continue to prepare a war against us, as they have repeatedly stated — I remind you that in Ukraine we are conducting a special military operation. But if they truly want war, it will be a completely different conflict with different means,” — 🗣️ Lavrov.

“If our European neighbors, instead of recognizing their mistakes and understanding that we will have to live together anyway, continue to prepare for war against us, as they have repeatedly said—I remind you that in Ukraine we are conducting a special military operation. But if they truly want war, it will be a completely different conflict with different means,” — 🗣️ Lavrov.

#UkraineRussiaWar #MilitarySummary 
Following the conclusion of the negotiation process in Geneva, Slovakia and Hungary imposed sanctions against Ukraine. 🇪🇺 ⚖️ Supplies of critically important fuels and petroleum products to Ukraine have been halted. 🛑 ⛽️ European countries are demanding the repair of the Druzhba pipeline and the resumption of transit through it. 🔧 🛢 

The Ukrainian side launched a massive strike deep into Russian territory. 🚀 💥 This time, the Pskov region came under attack. 🌍 Approximately 300 drones took part in this strike. 🇺🇦 ⚡️ 

As of the morning of February 19, 2026, the Russian Armed Forces have fully restored control over the city of Ternovatoe in the Zaporizhzhia region. 🇷🇺 ✅ Apparently, in the near future, we should expect a more decisive counteroffensive by the Russian Armed Forces in the areas previously lost as a result of the Ukrainian counteroffensive. ⚔️ 🔥 

 Unexpected Sanctions ⚡️ Massive Strikes Resume 💥 The Battle of Zaporizhzhia 🔥 Military Summary And Analysis For 2026.02.19

messages.text_en: Today, it is expected that the President Trump’s Peace Council will meet in Washington. More than 45 countries will participate in this meeting. Some of them will act as observers, such as Greece and Cyprus. There will be no representatives from Palestine at this meeting. Israel will participate as well. The following issues will be discussed during the meeting: the dissolution of Hamas from its weapons.

From the meeting of the Peace Council in Washington:  
Dr. Ali Shata, Chairman of the Committee for the Management of the Strip:  
We have started recruiting 2,000 Egyptian police officers.  
We have no choice but to expand the control over the Gaza Strip.  
I thank Qatar, Egypt, and Turkey for their support.  
President of Indonesia:  
We once again confirm that Indonesia is ready to send 8,000 or more soldiers to the Gaza Strip as part of the stabilization efforts.  
President of Romania:  
We are ready to receive 1,000 Egyptian children who need medical treatment. Additionally, we can also accommodate 4,000 Egyptian families in Romania.  
Prime Minister of Kuwait:  
We are willing to contribute billions of dollars for the reconstruction of the Gaza Strip.  
7 responses

messages.text_original:
ח'אמינאי, פרעה והצי האמריקאי - הכל בטבעת אחת 

הערב השתתף עלי ח'אמינאי המנהיג העליון של איראן במפגש מיוחד עם קהל לרגל יומו הראשון של חודש רמדאן באיראן.

ח'אמינאי ענד על אצבעו טבעת עם חריטה מיוחדת - ציטוט מפסוק 62 בסורת א-שעראא' בקוראן - סורת חזון המשוררים:

قَالَ كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّ مَعِىَ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ

תרגום : לא. כי האל עמי והוא ינחני.

הפסוק מופיע בהקשר של יציאת מצרים והוא מיוחס למשה רבנו בשעה שבני ישראל נלחצו כאשר המצרים רדפו אחריהם מצד והים חסם את דרכם מנגד - רגע לפני שמשה הכה על הים, כדי שייחצה לשניים ולאחר מכן טובעו המצרים ופרעה כאשר הים כיסה אותם.

ח'אמינאי בונה על אללה שיציל אותו מפני פרעה המודרני - הצי האמריקאי ויטביע אותו ואת ספינותיו בים....

נחכה ונראה

 5 תגובות
messages.text_en:
Khameini, Pharaoh, and the American Navy – all in one circle.  
That evening, Khameini, the supreme leader of Iran, attended a special event with a crowd of people to celebrate the first day of Ramadan in Iran.  
Khameini wore a ring on his finger, with a special inscription on it. It was a quote from verse 62 of the Quran’s Surah Al-Shuraa:  
“Quoth he: Truly, My Lord is with Me; He will guide Me.”  
This verse refers to the event of the Exodus from Egypt. It is attributed to Moses, when the Israelites were in great distress, as the Egyptians pursued them from both sides—from the sea on one side and from land on the other. Just before Moses struck the sea, it split into two parts. Then, the Egyptians drowned, just as Pharaoh was also doomed by the sea.  
Khameini relies on Allah to save him from modern-day Pharaohs – the American Navy will surely destroy him and his ships in the sea…  
Let’s wait and see.

messages.text_original:
🇪🇹 ⚡ - Tigray Defense Forces have entered and taken over the town of Alamata, southern Tigray Interim Administration, TIA, region, Ethiopia.

This marks the furthest south TDF have deployed its forces since the 2022 Pretoria Agreement.

Map by Rerum Novarum shows the approximate situation in Northern Ethiopia:

- Orange: TDF presence (it does not indicate control). TDF are TPLF factions, led by Debretsion Gebremichael and his TPLF-D unit, that support Tigray separatism. It also includes the large Masho Beyene-led TPLF-M faction .

TDF have heavy influence in the mountains of Agame and Asegede , and the towns around Gundagundi, along Eritrea's borders . TPLF-D's stronghold remains in the Angolaba area . The bulk of the TDF is located along the Tigray-Afar border region, where they have clashed with the Addis Ababa-backed ethnic Afar militias in the past. The lack of security personnel along the Tigray-Afar border provides the group with space to host military camps. It is therefore this area that will likely see the majority of fighting, if the Ethiopian military decides to launch its operation to capture all Tigray camps .

It's normally assumed that there are approximately 200,000 soldiers in the TDF, while Ethiopian media tends to inflate the numbers much higher.

- The brown border shows the Tigray Interim Administration , TIA. Note, the borders of the Tigray region and TIA are not the same, TIA controls slight areas of neighbouring regional territories (as per the 2022 Pretoria Agreement), and lays claim to additional lands .

TIA and its military affiliate Tigray Peace Forces, TPF, are loyal to the former TIA Chief Getachew Reda , who fled to Addis Ababa last year after clashes erupted between TIA (+TPF) and TPLF-D. TPF are mostly pro-Addis Ababa and have fought the TDF in the past . TPF's command structure is located in the neighbouring Afar region, secured by Addis Ababa-backed ethnic Afar militias.

 - Note, it's unconfirmed whether TPLF-70, a Sudan-based and pro-Khartoum Tigray unit, is allied with the TDF. Hence, its presence in the Fasherga area is not shown on the map.
- Note, Afar, Amhara, Ogaden and Oromia separatists are not shown on the map.

messages.text_original:
🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 Trump officials say there's a 90% chance of strikes on Iran. He can’t without Congress. 

Representative Thomas Massie & I have a War Powers Resolution to debate & vote on war before putting U.S. troops in harm’s way. I will make a motion to discharge to force a vote on it next week.

Trump is positioning two aircraft carriers, a dozen warships & hundreds of fighter jets to prepare for a possible war with Iran. I first got into politics to end the Iraq War. I won’t let Trump launch a disastrous war without Congress voting to stop it.

A war with Iran would be catastrophic. Iran is a complex society of 90 million people with significant air defenses and military capabilities. We also have 30-40k U.S. troops in the region who could be at risk of retaliation. Congress must do its job and stop this march to war.

The War Powers Resolution of 1973 was enacted over Nixon’s veto so that Congress could play an active role to weigh the merits of war and reflect the American people's will *before* the president unilaterally launched an attack.

The lawmakers who crafted the WPR stated hostilities "encompasses a state of confrontation in which no shots have been fired but where there is a clear and present danger of armed conflict." That’s exactly what Trump's military buildup is and why I am forcing a vote next week.

Like the votes before the Iraq war, this could be one of the most consequential votes in the history of Congress. Are we going to stop another endless dumb foreign war? Or will the neoconservatives mislead us once again?

 🧵 Rep. Ro Khanna

🇫🇷 ❌ 🇮🇹 Emmanuel Macron responded to Giorgia Meloni after she described the killing of 23-year-old Quentin Deranque in Lyon as “a wound for the whole of Europe.” 

Macron said nationalist leaders are often quick to comment on events beyond their borders, adding: “If everyone minded their own business, things would be just fine.”

 📝 : Macron's France is the same country which refuses to this day to extradite Italian communist terrorists (Red Brigades, see Years of Lead) continuing a policy instituted by the socialist president, François Mitterrand, who at the time argued that those terrorists would not receive "fair" sentences in Italian courts. 

In 2018, Emmanuel Macron was awarded the Charlemagne Prize by the EU "[for] his inspiring vision of a re-founding of the European project and his passionate fight against nationalism and isolationism." 

 🔗 Europa.com (@europa)

messages.text_original:
#Germany #Russia 

Reasonable and humanitarian arguments will not convince Vladimir Putin to end the war in Ukraine, Friedrich Merz believes. Therefore, there is almost no chance of a quick end to this war through negotiations, the German Chancellor said in an interview. According to Merz, the war will end only when one of the sides is exhausted. Therefore, the goal of European efforts is to ensure that the Russian Federation "cannot continue the war by military means and cannot continue to finance it economically," he said. The German Chancellor is confident that Putin's regime will not be able to do without war in the foreseeable future, because it "does not have a plan for what to do with hundreds of thousands, including seriously injured soldiers, who are returning from the front." Russia "is in a state of profound barbarism, and this will not change in the foreseeable future," Merz states.

The C-32B has been associated with the 150th Special Operations Squadron out of Joint Base McGuire, and is used to respond to government crisis response activities and support CIA Special Activities.
messages.text_en: A U.S. Air Force C-32B Gatekeeper with Air Force Special Operations Command (AFSOC) landed earlier today in Tel Aviv, Israel. The C-32B has been associated with the 150th Special Operations Squadron out of Joint Base McGuire, and is used to respond to government crisis response activities and support CIA Special Activities.

messages.text_original: Speaking during this morning’s meeting of his Board of Peace, President Donald J. Trump said that there is currently peace in the Middle East, despite the ongoing largest buildup of military aircraft in the region since the 2003 Invasion of Iraq. President Trump then states that there might be a deal with Iran and that people will find out in the next ten days, while further speaking about the success of Operation Midnight Hammer in June 2025.

messages.text_original: President Donald J. Trump announces that the United States will be contributing $10 billion to his Board of Peace.
messages.text_en: President Donald J. Trump announces that the United States will be contributing $10 billion to his Board of Peace.

messages.text_original: President Donald J. Trump: “Now is the time for Iran to join us on a path that will complete what we're doing. And if they join us, that'll be great. If they don't join us, that'll be great, too. But it'll be a very different path. They cannot continue to threaten the stability of the entire region. They must make a deal - or if that doesn't happen, I maybe can understand. If it doesn't happen, it doesn't happen. But bad things will happen if it doesn't.”

messages.text_original: The Commander of the International Stabilization Force (ISF) in Gaza, Maj. Gen. Jasper Jeffers, announces that five countries have pledged to send troops to the ISF, including Albania, Indonesia, Kazakhstan, Kosovo, and Morocco, while Egypt and Jordan have committed to training police for the Gaza Strip. Additionally, Gen. Jeffers states that Indonesia has been offered and has accepted the role of Deputy Commander of the ISF.
messages.text_en: The Commander of the International Stabilization Force (ISF) in Gaza, Maj. Gen. Jasper Jeffers, announces that five countries have pledged to send troops to the ISF, including Albania, Indonesia, Kazakhstan, Kosovo, and Morocco, while Egypt and Jordan have committed to training police for the Gaza Strip. Additionally, Gen. Jeffers states that Indonesia has been offered and has accepted the role of Deputy Commander of the ISF.

messages.text_original: President Trump: “I don't like young, handsome men. Women? I like. Men, no, I don’t have any interest.”
messages.text_en: President Trump: “I don't like young, handsome men. Women? I like. Men, no, I don’t have any interest.”

messages.text_original: Poland on Thursday urged its citizens to immediately leave Iran, as the ongoing buildup of military assets by the United States continues across the Middle East. “Please leave Iran immediately and under no circumstances travel to this country,” Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk said, “I do not want to alarm anyone, but we all know what I am referring to. The possibility of a conflict is very real.” Adding that, “In a few, a dozen, or several dozen hours, evacuation may no longer be possible.”
messages.text_en: Poland on Thursday urged its citizens to immediately leave Iran, as the ongoing buildup of military assets by the United States continues across the Middle East. “Please leave Iran immediately and under no circumstances travel to this country,” Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk said, “I do not want to alarm anyone, but we all know what I am referring to. The possibility of a conflict is very real.” Adding that, “In a few, a dozen, or several dozen hours, evacuation may no longer be possible.”

messages.text_original: Despite two rounds of negotiations between Iran and the United States, with the Americans demanding an end to Tehran’s nuclear work and constraints on its long-range ballistic missile program and support for regional armed proxies, Iran has thus far rejected a sweeping arrangement and has offered only modest concessions on its nuclear program. The impasse, which U.S. officials increasingly say is unlikely to be broken, has raised the prospects of strikes against Iran, officials tell the Wall Street Journal.
messages.text_en: Despite two rounds of negotiations between Iran and the United States, with the Americans demanding an end to Tehran’s nuclear work and constraints on its long-range ballistic missile program and support for regional armed proxies, Iran has thus far rejected a sweeping arrangement and has offered only modest concessions on its nuclear program. The impasse, which U.S. officials increasingly say is unlikely to be broken, has raised the prospects of strikes against Iran, officials tell the Wall Street Journal.

messages.text_original: Yet another busy day for the U.S. Air Force over Europe, with KC-135R Stratotankers and KC-46A Pegasus continuing to arrive in the region and ferry fighter aircraft to the Middle East, as a clear steady line of C-17A Globemaster IIIs can be seen transporting personnel and equipment between bases in Europe and those in Bahrain, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, and Qatar.
messages.text_en: Yet another busy day for the U.S. Air Force over Europe, with KC-135R Stratotankers and KC-46A Pegasus continuing to arrive in the region and ferry fighter aircraft to the Middle East, as a clear steady line of C-17A Globemaster IIIs can be seen transporting personnel and equipment between bases in Europe and those in Bahrain, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, and Qatar.

messages.text_original: More fuel for thirsty fighter jets as additional aerial-refueling tankers prepare to cross the Atlantic towards Europe, with 5 KC-135R/T Stratotankers lifting off from McConnell Air Force Base in Wichita, Kansas bound for Morón Air Base, Spain.
messages.text_en: More fuel for thirsty fighter jets as additional aerial-refueling tankers prepare to cross the Atlantic towards Europe, with 5 KC-135R/T Stratotankers lifting off from McConnell Air Force Base in Wichita, Kansas bound for Morón Air Base, Spain.

🕵‍♂️ 📍 I was able to more precisely geolocate the aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN-72), and IRGC Drones seem to be flying over Trump's Armada.

 ✈️ CMV-22B reg 169453 took off from Duqm and disappeared around 09H30UTC

Same CMV-22B leaves the aircraft carrier and appears at 11H23UTC

It leaves less than two hours to land, do whatever they have to do, and take off again. Cannot be further than this area due to speed.

Bonus: The path of the Iranian Shahed-129 type drone today, definitely visually sighting the aircraft carrier.

messages.text_original:
📣 Well, it looks to be over. 📣 

Tonight, without any prior announcements, Twitter has disabled any access to tweets withot login. This means that the bot can't retrieve the data anymore, so I am shutting it down.

I'll keep the channels, but there will be no updates unless Twitter reverses its decision or I will find a way to bypass this limitation (which is unlikely).

It's very ironic and sad to see how two big platforms, Twitter and Reddit, go down the closure pass simultaneousely.

Thank you for staying here for all this time.
messages.text_en:
📣 Well, it looks to be over. 📣 

Tonight, without any prior announcements, Twitter has disabled any access to tweets withot login. This means that the bot can't retrieve the data anymore, so I am shutting it down.

I'll keep the channels, but there will be no updates unless Twitter reverses its decision or I will find a way to bypass this limitation (which is unlikely).

It's very ironic and sad to see how two big platforms, Twitter and Reddit, go down the closure pass simultaneousely.

Thank you for staying here for all this time.

messages.text_original:
With the agreement in the north, attention returns once again to Suwayda, where, following the fall of the SDF, the Druze have lost Damascus's power of containment over the south, now only prevented by the Israeli threat of reprisals in the event of a new massacre like the one in July against the Druze and Christian population.
Although the population of Suwayda is largely opposed to the Damascus authorities, it is possible that an agreement similar to that of the SDF will be implemented in Suwayda, leaving the National Guard Forces as the ‘Asayish’ of the south in exchange for the symbolic entry of the MOI into Druze territory and its strategic areas in coordination with a normalisation agreement with Israel (cession of the Golan Heights and demilitarisation of the south).
This would prevent a new massacre and officially (though not formally) end the first Syrian civil war.
messages.text_en:
With the agreement in the north, attention returns once again to Suwayda, where, following the fall of the SDF, the Druze have lost Damascus's power of containment over the south, now only prevented by the Israeli threat of reprisals in the event of a new massacre like the one in July against the Druze and Christian population.
Although the population of Suwayda is largely opposed to the Damascus authorities, it is possible that an agreement similar to that of the SDF will be implemented in Suwayda, leaving the National Guard Forces as the ‘Asayish’ of the south in exchange for the symbolic entry of the MOI into Druze territory and its strategic areas in coordination with a normalisation agreement with Israel (cession of the Golan Heights and demilitarisation of the south).
This would prevent a new massacre and officially (though not formally) end the first Syrian civil war.

The second "Iskander launch" was mixed up with Russian S-300/400 air defence activity against Ukrainian UAVs near Crimea.
messages.text_en:
The Iskander-M ballistic missile which struck Voznesensk, Mykolaiv Oblast, was launched from near the village of Mazanka, northeast of Simferopol, Crimea.

The second "Iskander launch" was mixed up with Russian S-300/400 air defence activity against Ukrainian UAVs near Crimea.

🇧🇾 🇷🇺 The President of Belarus, Alexander Lukashenko, said that the conversion of the Belarusian Su-24 military aircraft to carry nuclear weapons has been completed. 

 According to the Belarusian leader, the republic is ready to adequately respond to threats from Western countries. 

 "They have to understand that no helicopters, planes, if they escalate, will not save them." Putin and I once said in St. Petersburg that we would also retool the Belarusian Su24 planes so that they could carry nuclear weapons. What do you think we're talking about? All set!". 

 Lukashenko also denied the words of German Chancellor Olaf Scholz that Russian President Vladimir Putin allegedly does not recognize the sovereignty of Belarus.

А це вже звіти по провайдеру Трініті в Донецьку. Ми перемикаємось і повертаємось до провайдерів як тільки вони виходять з захисту РКН чи геоблоків. 

Сховати вони усіх не можуть. Геоблок кладе все без розбору. 

Як думаєте скільки ще ми зможемо це робити? Довго!
—
And these are already reports on the Trinity provider in Donetsk. We switch over and return to providers as soon as they come out from under Roskomnadzor protection or geoblocks.

They can’t hide everyone. A geoblock takes everything down indiscriminately.

How long do you think we’ll still be able to do this? Long!
messages.text_en:
And these are already reports regarding the Trinity provider in Donetsk. We switch over and return to dealing with providers as soon as they get out of Roskomnadzor’s protection or geoblocks.

They can’t hide everyone. A geoblock destroys everything without any distinction.

How long do you think we’ll be able to continue doing this? For a long time!
